creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Coincidentally, I had sent an optionNG patch to maintainer hours prior to
this submission, and the attached patch has been approved by portmgrs (bapt,miwi).

In my humble opinion, this takes full advantage of all of our new options
framework and removes some unneeded breaking and checks.

I've sent this patch personally, but when I saw this PR come through I
thought it was best to get this into the GNATS.

Thanks!

-jgh

-- 
Jason Helfman
FreeBSD Committer | http://people.freebsd.org/~jgh | The Power To Serve
